widget.name: Datepicker
widget.description: Simple date picker widget for Mendix

property.caption: Start Date/Time Attribute
property.description: Select the DateTime attribute used for the start date and start time.

property.caption: End Date/Time Attribute
property.description: Select the DateTime attribute used for the end date and end time. This is also used in single-date mode for the end time.

property.caption: Minimum Date Attribute
property.description: Optional DateTime attribute used as the minimum allowed date.

property.caption: Maximum Date Attribute
property.description: Optional DateTime attribute used as the maximum allowed date.

property.caption: Picker Mode
property.description: Choose whether the widget selects one date or a start-end range.

property.caption: Selection Mode
property.description: Deprecated. The widget now focuses on a date flow with a start-end time range.

property.caption: Enable Time Picker
property.description: Deprecated helper toggle kept for compatibility with older configurations.

property.caption: Label
property.description: Optional label shown above the input.

property.caption: Start Placeholder
property.description: Optional placeholder text for the main input.

property.caption: End Placeholder
property.description: Optional placeholder text for the range end input.

property.caption: Helper Text
property.description: Optional helper text shown below the input.

property.caption: Date Format
property.description: Optional react-datepicker format string such as yyyy-MM-dd or yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm.

property.caption: Show Calendar Icon
property.description: Show a small calendar icon inside the input.

property.caption: Allow Clear
property.description: Allow users to clear the selected value.

property.caption: Date Input Read Only
property.description: Lock the date selection while still allowing users to adjust the time range.

property.caption: Disabled
property.description: Disable the date picker so users cannot open or change it.

property.caption: On Change
property.description: Optionally run an action after the user changes the date or time range.
